title: Cave Game
body:
![CG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/756de98ed794319691080ca862f9f3fbeabe53f9.png)

Step back in time with the Cave Game Modpack, a faithful recreation of Minecraft’s early alpha era, designed to bring back the charm and simplicity of the game’s early days. Experience the nostalgia of classic terrain, old-school mechanics, and the iconic aesthetic that made Minecraft legendary.

- Classic Aesthetics – Faithful Alpha-style textures, lighting, and UI for that old-school feel.
- Beta Terrain & Worldgen – Enjoy simple yet beautiful landscapes with nostalgic world                         
  generation.
- Simplified Gameplay – No hunger bar, old-school combat, and a return to Minecraft’s roots.
- Vintage Soundtrack & Ambience – Hear the classic music and sounds that defined early Minecraft.
- Optimized for Performance – Lightweight and smooth, just like the original Alpha versions.

Whether you're a veteran seeking nostalgia or a new player curious about Minecraft’s origins, the Cave Game Modpack is your portal to the past
